title: Anamorphic Studies
description: Three independent perspective illusion images with one readable resolved shape from a controlled camera point.
creative_direction: Each image uses a different physical setting for an anamorphic illusion: rooftop paint, cylindrical mirror reflection, and transit-floor wayfinding.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Anamorphic Studies
en.description: Three independent perspective illusion images with one readable resolved shape from a controlled camera point.

zh-CN.title: 变形透视单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立透视错觉图，从受控机位看见一个完整图形。
